title: 2026-03-23 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 37.08
description: New daily signal for 2026-03-23: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 37.08/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2026-03-23, the score printed 37.08/100 in the elevated regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
